creator: mca_two@hotmail.com
text:
Using poudriere, the build fails: No space left on device: 'build/scons/sconsign.py3.tmp'

h/w config Pentium G4560, 16GB RAM, >800GB free diskspace

/usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/make.conf
    DISABLE_LICENSES=yes
    ALLOW_UNSUPPORTED_SYSTEM=no
    OPTIONS_SET+= NOAVX

last bits of the massive log file:
...
c++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-stdlib=libc++' [-Wunused-command-line-argument]
LLVM ERROR: out of memory
Allocation failed
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.freebsd.org/submit/ and include the crash backtrace.
